subject: WM-0065 review: changes_requested
body: High: resolveCrisis can terminally resolve directly from ACTIVATED with no low-risk evidence or escalation, violating the ordered borrowed-shadow chain; High: failCrisis accepts TERMINAL_HARM from ACTIVATED before any low-risk evidence, allowing irreversible harm before evidence; High: activation basis validation accepts negative/non-uint32 version fields, negative identityIndependentClassCount, and oversized identitySupportTier, causing typed-array wrap/truncation in owner state. Required checks pass but focused regressions are missing.
